## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Core ingestion/parsing
- [ ] Canonical model/chunking
- [ ] Retrieval/Context Pack
- [ ] Evidence trace
- [ ] API/CLI
- [ ] Bot/agent adapter
- [ ] Evaluation
- [ ] Docs only

## Verification

```text
pytest -q
```

## Data Safety

- [ ] No confidential raw documents are included.
- [ ] No generated artifacts are included.
- [ ] Evidence trace behavior is preserved or intentionally updated.
